prompt: Pull a list of the active tasks at Operations and report each record's ID, name, and due date. Do not change or notify anything yet. If a listed record lacks a requested field, label that field unknown.

follow_up_turns.content: For Vendor scorecard refresh (TSK-7090) only, set the due date to 2026-11-17. Leave the other listed records unchanged and do not notify anyone.
Correction: set TSK-7090's due date to 2026-12-21, not 2026-11-17. Keep the same target and the same no-notification rule.

stages.purpose: List the requested filtered records so the later explicit ID remains tied to the correct entity.
Apply the first due date only to the explicitly selected listed record.
Replace that due date with the user's correction on the same listed record.

response_constraints: Use the filtered list to establish the available records; do not substitute a search call for the requested list.
Apply both due date instructions only to the explicitly named target ID from the list.
Do not claim the list or either update succeeded unless its tool result confirms it.
Report the corrected due date as current and identify the first requested due date as superseded.
Label requested fields omitted by the list or update results as unknown.
